div.head: The Chargé in Brazil (Burdett) to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
Rio de Janeiro, December 13, 1940—3 p.m.
[Received 5:21 p.m.]

div.p:
661. For the Under Secretary. Reference Embassy’s No. 658, December 11, 6 p.m. The Minister for Foreign Affairs today showed me a telegram from his Ambassador in London which said with regard to the Siqueira Campos case that the Foreign Office requests
that no action be taken in Brazil at this time and promises that the case will be settled within a few days.
However, the D. I. P. today issued an order forbidding newsreels shown in Bio from running any Reference to Great Britain.
